definition:
1. a going round, a flank march , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. a way round, the circumference, circuit, compass , τοῦ τείχεος, τῆς λίμνης (Herdotus Historicus); absolute, τὴν π. in circumference , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. γῆς π. a chart  or map  of the earth (compare πίναξ); (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. a going round in a circle, circuit , (Plutarch) 
5. of Time, a cycle  or period of time , (Pindar), etc. 
6. a prescribed course of life, system , (Plato Philosophus) 
7. a fit  of intermittent fever, (Demosthenes Orator) 
8. = περιφορά, a course at dinner , (Xenophon Historicus); π. λόγων table-talk , (Xenophon Historicus) 
9. the orbit of a heavenly body , (Xenophon Historicus) 
10. a well-rounded sentence, period , (Aristotle Philosopher) (ML)
